markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GTM campaign performance and align on new outreach automations.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Email performance is 4x the industry standard:** The Instantly "Lovable" campaign gets 1 positive reply per 100 sends, vs. the 1:400 benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**New email infrastructure launches in \~1 week:** This will double email volume, aiming to double registrants.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Two new automations are being built:**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**SIP Outreach:** Auto-engages leads who interact with Jason/Marcel's LinkedIn posts.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Recruitment Outreach:** Automates Jason's manual LinkedIn recruitment.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [**Breakfast event campaign is live:** Understory will source new cold leads to expand the list.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Campaign Performance Review

  - [**Instantly "Lovable" Campaign (Email)**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Performance:** 37 positive replies from \~20k sends (last 2 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Adding new leads to the sequence is a key growth tactic because the first email generates the most responses.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [**HayReach Campaign (LinkedIn)**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [**Performance:** 38 replies (last 2 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Connection acceptance and message reply rates are both near the 20% "good" benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [**Breakfast Event Campaign**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
      - [**Status:** Launched yesterday.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
      - [**Lead Expansion:** Understory will source new cold leads using a recently purchased, larger database.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Process:** New leads will enter the standard LinkedIn sequence, with duplicates against the current list removed.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

### New Outreach Automations

  - [**SIP Outreach Automation**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Goal:** Automatically engage leads who interact with Jason/Marcel's LinkedIn posts.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
        1.  [**SIP → Clay:** Capture post engagement data.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
        2.  [**Clay:** Qualify and clean lead data.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
        3.  [**HayReach:** Auto-send a LinkedIn message from Jason's account.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Status:** Table built; copy is being finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Recruitment Outreach Automation**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [**Goal:** Automate Jason's manual LinkedIn recruitment outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [**Status:** Requires a decision from Jason on the lead upload method (via Clay or directly in HayReach).](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [Record Loom videos for Jason detailing the SIP and Recruitment automation requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [Source and share the new cold lead list for the Breakfast event campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Follow up with the current Breakfast campaign list via direct email/message.](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [**Naufal:**](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [Notify the team when the new email infrastructure is ready (\~1 week).](https://fathom.video/share/skcs4u23eVJPybNqyH7rgwGrA-2cZRHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
